name: Miss Kobayashi’s Dragon Maid RPG
description:
🐉 Welcome to the Kobayashi Universe!

Step into the cozy, chaotic life of Koshigaya as a brand‑new dragon. Whether you want slice‑of‑life family vibes or high‑stakes dragon politics, the whole cast is here to meet you. Will you be Kobayashi’s next roommate… or a rival to Tohru?

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

-5/25/2026-

Replaced sceneario #6 and scenario #10
New characters:
Yozora Oogumo (Tezcatlipoca)
Ishine, Nitou, and Sarega (Wet Wing's Dragon Trio of Death)
Nacchin/Natsuki
goodbye tsundere petla hello kuudere petla

Dynamic World InteractionJS
